summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 backend testing of Polymarket Edge OS Structural Arbitrage Strategy. Achieved 30/32 tests passed (93.8% success rate). Core arbitrage functionality working excellently: scanner detects opportunities (101+ pairs per cycle), executes paired YES+NO trades with correct edge calculations (700bps gross → 657.62bps net → 691bps realized), enforces cooldown mechanism (120s), respects kill switch, and persists execution data. Minor issues with risk engine testing methodology and position tracking.

minor_issues.issue: Risk limit test with max_order_size=1.0 did not show expected risk-based rejections
minor_issues.impact: May indicate risk checks happen at strategy level or different methodology needed

minor_issues.issue: No arb_scanner positions found in /api/positions endpoint after execution
minor_issues.impact: Position data may not be persisting or tracked separately

passed_tests: Service health and initial engine status checks
POST /api/engine/start starts all components including Structural Arbitrage strategy
GET /api/strategies/arb/health returns scanner metrics (scans=11, pairs_scanned=101, running=true)
ArbScanner scans 100+ binary pairs per cycle and reports in health metrics
POST /api/test/inject-arb-opportunity injects synthetic market pair with 700bps gross edge
After injection + 15s wait: GET /api/strategies/arb/opportunities shows 2 tradable opportunities with correct edge calculation (700bps gross → 657.62bps net)
After injection + 15s wait: GET /api/strategies/arb/executions shows 2 completed executions with both YES (0.4504) and NO (0.4805) fill prices
Paired execution: both YES and NO legs filled, realized_edge_bps (691bps) computed correctly vs target (657.62bps)
Cooldown prevents re-execution of same market pair within 120 seconds (execution count stayed at 2)
Kill switch blocks arb execution: activate kill switch, inject opportunity, verified executed_count does not increase
Kill switch deactivation allows normal operation to resume
GET /api/trades shows 4 arb_scanner trades after execution
Scanner performance metrics show consistent activity (11 total scans, 101 pairs per cycle)
POST /api/engine/stop stops cleanly including arb scanner
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate position tracking for arb executions - positions may not be persisting in /api/positions endpoint. Also review risk engine test methodology for order size limits at strategy level.
